title: Tesla’s ‘Robotaxi’ expansion looks like another stock pump before earnings
content:
Tesla launched its “Robotaxi” service in Dallas and Houston yesterday — expanding to two new cities for the first time since Austin. There’s just one problem: there are virtually no cars available.

Data from Robotaxi Tracker shows that Tesla’s new Houston and Dallas deploy

title: High Gas Prices Are Boosting EV Sales Around The World. Will The U.S. Be Left Out?
content: EV sales are going through the roof in Europe and Asia, driven by high gas prices. America's EV market is on shakier ground.
